mapper.select: select worker_name ,etc ,worker_id from tb_worker_mst where area_cd = #{areaCd} and process_cd = #{procCd} order by worker_name
select equipment_name ,equipment_cd ,equipment_id from tb_equipment_mst where storage_cd = #{storageCd} order by display_order

select work_proc_id , item_cd , work_date , work_start_time , work_end_time , worker_cnt , use_Qty , prod_Qty , work_Record_Id , work_proc_id from tb_work_record where work_Record_Id = #{workRecordId}

select b.test_nos ,a.mat_name ,a.spec_info ,a.ex_Appearance ,a.packing_spec_value ,a.packing_spec_unit ,a.unit ,b.req_qty ,b.use_qty ,b.bad_qty ,b.work_bad_qty ,a.item_cd ,a.item_name ,b.prod_info_id ,b.prod_use_id ,a.work_batch_id ,a.work_order_id ,a.work_proc_id from ( select a.work_batch_id ,a.work_proc_id ,a.work_order_id ,c.item_cd ,e.mat_name ,e.spec_info ,e.ex_Appearance ,e.packing_spec_value ,e.packing_spec_unit ,d.unit ,dbo.getItemName(c.item_cd) as item_name from TB_WORK_ORDER_PROC a inner join tb_bom_mst b on a.item_cd = b.item_cd and b.default_yn = 'Y' inner join tb_bom_recipe c on c.bom_id = b.bom_id inner join tb_item_mst d on c.item_cd = d.item_cd inner join tb_item_detail e on e.item_cd = d.item_cd where a.work_proc_id = #{workProcId} ) a left outer join ( select a.* ,b.prod_use_id from tb_prod_info a left outer join tb_prod_use b on b.prod_info_id = a.prod_info_id ) b on a.work_proc_id = b.work_proc_id and a.item_cd = b.item_cd
mapper.insert: insert into tb_prod_use (prod_Info_Id, test_no, item_cd, lot_no, req_qty, use_qty, bad_qty, work_Bad_Qty, reg_id, upd_id) values (#{prodInfoId}, #{testNo}, #{itemCd}, #{lotNo}, #{reqQty}, #{useQty}, #{badQty}, #{workBadQty}, #{userId}, #{userId} )
mapper.select: select d.item_type_cd ,a.item_cd ,dbo.getItemName(a.item_cd) as item_name ,c.lot_no ,d.test_no ,d.expiry_date ,c.use_qty ,b.prod_info_id from TB_WORK_ORDER_PROC a inner join tb_prod_info b on a.work_proc_id = b.work_proc_id inner join tb_prod_use c on c.prod_info_id = b.prod_info_id inner join tb_item_test_no d on d.test_no = a.test_no where a.work_proc_id = #{workProcId}

select b.item_cd ,dbo.getItemName(b.item_cd) as item_name ,b.test_no ,b.lot_no ,b.use_qty ,c.item_type_cd ,c.spec ,(select storage_cd from TB_WORK_ORDER_PROC where work_proc_id = a.work_proc_id) as storage_cd ,d.expiry_Date from tb_prod_info a inner join tb_prod_use b on b.prod_info_id = a.prod_info_id inner join tb_item_mst c on b.item_cd = c.item_cd inner join tb_item_test_no d on b.test_no = d.test_no where a.work_proc_id = #{workProcId}
